raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/2025, I filed a dispute with Citi regarding a charge on my Citi XXXX Preferred Card for {$1000.00} made on XX/XX/2025 by Wayfair. 

I provided detailed documentation supporting my claim, including photos of the broken merchandise. 

Despite this, Citi denied the dispute siding with Wayfair, even though I provided photos of the broken merchandise.

I believe this denial was unjustified and that Citi failed to conduct a proper investigation as required under the Fair Credit Billing Act. I am seeking a reversal of the charge or a more thorough review of the dispute with full consideration of my evidence.

would like Citi to reopen and properly investigate the dispute, or issue a full refund for the amount in question. I also request a clear explanation of how the decision was reached and a copy of any documentation provided by the merchant to refute my claim.
